critic.verdict: An excellent, rhythmically pristine casual chart that perfectly captures the synthwave grid and track structure.

issues.problem: The outro spacing drops to 6-beat intervals, which feels slightly too sparse and disengaging, even for a casual difficulty.

design_notes: S0 introduces the synth groove with a clean introductory hold. S1 steps into the drop with an active 1-beat cadence to match the onset intensity. S2 maintains a steady, casual 2-beat alternating rhythm across all lanes to sustain momentum. S3 transitions into a spacious break, letting the pattern breathe deeply with a much lower density.

design_sections.name: Intro
design_sections.intent: Introduce the beat cleanly with a simple flow.

design_sections.name: Drop Start
design_sections.intent: Build excitement with a steady alternating lane sweep.

design_sections.name: Break/Outro
design_sections.intent: Let the chart breathe with long-spaced notes.
